case_title: AHMADI, BAHMAN et al VS JACKSON, CHALES L.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $850.00 FILED BY AHMADI, BAHMAN AHMADI, FARIBA AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, CHALES L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-02-1994, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO APR-18-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AHMADI, BAHMAN AHMADI, FARIBA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, CHALES L. $625.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $645.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, CHALES L.
